title: Cloud: Critical OCI Audit Events (l21d)
description: Tile count of destructive or high-risk OCI control-plane actions (delete/terminate/remove) across the audit log. Headline KPI for the Cloud/Identity attack story on the SOC command center.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ('Event Type' like '*delete*' or 'Event Type' like '*terminate*' or 'Event Type' like '*remove*' or 'Event Type' like '*DeletePolicy*' or 'Event Type' like '*DeleteCompartment*') | stats count as CloudThreats
